name: ddd-workshop
description: DDD pipeline — 6 conversational skills following the canonical strategic-then-tactical order. requirements-refiner (Pre-DDD: context + UL base language + 8-item self-audit + optional web research + 1-Q-at-a-time queue), event-storming-explorer (Big Picture Event Storming: past-tense events + actors + subdomain *identification* only, no classification), subdomain-classifier (narrowed role: Core/Supporting/Generic classification + Why + Slice-first target selection), context-designer (Bounded Context design + Context Map + per-BC Canvas with embedded per-BC Ubiquitous Language in bilingual 용어/Code Identifier/의미 format; cross-BC terms go to optional published-language.md), screen-inventory (optional: per-BC screen list with display data + actions + Query names, surfaces read-paths without wireframes), aggregate-designer (Design-Level Event Storming + Aggregate + Invariant/Policy + Exposed Queries cross-checked against screen-inventory; Aggregate-reconstruction-for-reads explicitly forbidden). Artifacts live in docs/shared/contexts/<bc>/ (renamed from domains/). Produced documents carry no YAML frontmatter — git history is the source of truth. Every skill embeds a shared UX protocol (numbered menus, progress markers, skip-allowed, three-level self-audit) and supports --update for delta edits.
